forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Clear. Low around 56, with temperatures rising to around 58 overnight. Northeast wind 2 to 6 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 73, with temperatures falling to around 70 in the afternoon. North northwest wind 2 to 17 mph.

weather_report:
In the hushed stillness of the early morning, Downtown San Francisco finds itself blanketed in a soft clarity, the skies above promising a luminous day as fog drifts back over the bay. With temperatures lingering comfortably in the mid-50s, the air carries the rough edges of a gentle chill, further accentuated by a light northeast wind that flirts playfully at two to six miles per hour. As dawn breaks, the promise of sunshine waits just beyond the horizon, with the sun poised to rise toward a peak of warmth near 73 degrees by afternoon, only to pull back slightly as the day matures. 

As the sun makes its slow ascent, it will usher in bright, sunny moments, illuminating the city with potential and serendipity. While the breeze sways gently, a light jacket may serve well in the morning chill, yet come midday, layers can be shed for short sleeves and leisurely strolls. The sensible could find delight in the urban fabric of San Francisco—exploring hidden alleyways adorned with murals, sipping coffee on a sun-drenched patio, or resting a while in one of the city’s lush parks, embracing the simple wonders the day has to offer. Today marks a perfect canvas—neither overly warm nor too cool, it invites you to embrace the city’s vibrant pulse amidst a backdrop of sparkling skies.
